account.subscriptionWarningBodyPrefix: Your App Store or Play Store subscription is
account.subscriptionWarningBodySuffix: automatically cancelled. Open your device's subscription settings before deleting your account, or you may continue to be billed.
account.warningBody1: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data, including profiles, learning progress, and consent records.
account.warningBody2: You'll have a 7-day grace period to change your mind. After that, your data cannot be recovered.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: MentoMate is an AI-powered mentoring platform operated by Zwizzly ("we", "us", "our"). We are committed to protecting the privacy of all our users, especially children aged 11–17. We process personal data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.s2Body1: Account data: email address, display name, and profile information you provide during registration.
privacy.s2Body2: Learning data: subjects, interview responses, curriculum progress, session exchanges, assessment results, retention scores, and XP.
privacy.s2Body3: Device data: push notification tokens, device type, and app version for delivering notifications and maintaining service quality.
privacy.s2Body4: We do NOT collect location data, contacts, photos (except homework images you explicitly capture), or browsing history.
privacy.s3Body: To provide personalised AI mentoring using Socratic dialogue and spaced repetition. To generate curricula, learning insights, and progress reports. To send review reminders and notifications you have opted into. To improve our service through anonymised, aggregated analytics.
privacy.s4Body1: For users under 16, we require verifiable parental consent before processing personal data. A parent or guardian must approve the child's account via email before any learning data is collected.
privacy.s4Body2: Parents can withdraw consent at any time from the parent dashboard. Upon withdrawal, the child's data enters a 7-day grace period and is then permanently deleted.
privacy.s5Body: Learning sessions are processed by third-party AI model providers to generate educational responses. Session content may be sent to AI providers for processing but is not used to train their models. We do not share personally identifiable information with AI providers — only learning content.
privacy.s6Body1: We do not sell your data. We share data only with: authentication provider (Clerk) for sign-in; AI providers for learning sessions; email provider (Resend) for notifications; error tracking (Sentry) for app stability; in-app purchase management (RevenueCat) for subscription processing; payment processors for subscription management.
privacy.s6Body2: For users under 13, error tracking (Sentry) is disabled until parental consent is granted. It is re-disabled if consent is withdrawn.
privacy.s7Body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, your data enters a 7-day grace period (during which you can cancel deletion), after which it is permanently removed.
privacy.s8Body1: You have the right to: access your data (via the Export feature in Settings); correct inaccurate data; delete your account and all associated data; withdraw consent for data processing; object to processing; data portability.
privacy.s8Body2: To exercise these rights, use the in-app settings or contact us at privacy@mentomate.com.
privacy.s9Body: We use industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (TLS), secure authentication, and profile-scoped data isolation ensuring each user can only access their own data.
privacy.s10Body: For privacy questions or concerns, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@mentomate.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: By creating an account or using MentoMate, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you are under 18, your parent or guardian must agree on your behalf.
terms.s2Body: MentoMate is an AI-powered mentoring platform that provides personalised learning through Socratic dialogue, spaced repetition, and adaptive curricula. The service is designed for students aged 11-15 with parental oversight.
terms.s3Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information during registration. You must not share your account with others or create multiple accounts.
terms.s4Body: MentoMate is for educational purposes only. You agree not to: use the service for any unlawful purpose; attempt to circumvent safety features; submit harmful, abusive, or inappropriate content; reverse engineer or attempt to extract the AI models or algorithms.
terms.s5Body: MentoMate uses AI to generate educational content. While we strive for accuracy, AI responses may occasionally contain errors. The service is a learning aid and does not replace professional education, tutoring, or academic advice.
terms.s6Body: MentoMate offers a free tier with limited daily and monthly usage. Paid subscriptions are available through Apple App Store or Google Play Store. Subscription terms, pricing, and cancellation are governed by the respective app store policies. Refunds are handled by the app store through which you subscribed.
terms.s7Body: All MentoMate content, design, and technology are owned by Zwizzly. Your learning data (session exchanges, notes, summaries) belongs to you. We license it only to provide the service.
terms.s8Body: MentoMate is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.s9Body: You may delete your account at any time from Settings. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Upon termination, your data is handled according to our Privacy Policy.
terms.s10Body: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s11Body: These terms are governed by the applicable laws of the European Union, including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with applicable EU consumer protection and data privacy regulations.
terms.s12Body: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@mentomate.com.

assessment.title: Knowledge Check
assessment.openingMessage:
Let's see what you've picked up so far. Just do your best, and I'll help fill in any gaps.

First question: what are the main things you remember about this topic? Share one or two examples if you can.
assessment.firstQuestion: First question: what are the main things you remember about this topic? Share one or two examples if you can.
assessment.borderlineBody: You got the core ideas. Want a quick catch-up on the bits you weren't sure about?

assessment.failedExhaustedBody: That topic needs another look. Let's go through it together.
assessment.passedMessage: You've got a solid grasp of most of this — {{mastery}}% mastery! The areas to revisit will show up in your Library.

subject.loadingMessage: We're pulling together sessions, reviews, and saved words for this subject.
subject.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again.
subject.errorMessageServer: Something went wrong on our end. Tap below to retry.
subject.errorMessageNetwork: Check your connection and try again.
subject.milestoneNoData: Complete a session to start tracking your milestone progress.
subject.retentionLoadError: We couldn't load what needs review right now.
subject.retentionFading: Getting fuzzy — a quick review will help.
subject.hideSubjectHint: Hides this subject from your main student views. You can restore it from Library later.
subject.hideConfirmMessage: This will move the subject out of your main views. Your learning history stays saved, and you can restore it from Library.
subject.goneTitle: This subject is no longer available
subject.goneSubtitle: It may have been removed or merged into another subject.

vocabulary.errorMessage: Check your connection and try again.
vocabulary.noLanguageMessage: Vocabulary tracking is available for language subjects.
vocabulary.newLearnerSubtitle: Keep learning and the words you discover will appear here.
vocabulary.emptyMessageOne: Practice {{subject}} to start building your word list.
vocabulary.emptyMessageMany: Practice a language subject to start building your word list.
vocabulary.emptyMessageNone: Start a language subject and the words you learn will appear here.

subjectSessions.title: Past conversations
subjectSessions.loadingTooLong: Conversations are taking too long to load
subjectSessions.loadingMessage: Check your connection and try again, or go back to subject progress.

mentorLanguagePicker.title: What language should your mentor speak?
mentorLanguagePicker.subtitle: Your mentor will use this language for chats, encouragement, and explanations. You can change it later in More.

otherModal.title: Which language?
otherModal.subtitle: We'll pass your request to the team and let you know when we add it.
otherModal.thanksMessage: We've passed your request to the team.

swapAppPrompt.title: Switch the app to {{language}} too?
swapAppPrompt.message: Your mentor will speak {{language}}. Want the rest of the app interface in {{language}} as well?

languageSetup.title: Language setup
languageSetup.calibrationSubtitle: Which language do you speak at home? One tap, then we start.
languageSetup.subtitle: We'll switch this subject into a language-focused path with direct instruction, vocabulary tracking, and speaking practice.
languageSetup.approachHint: We'll use a language-focused approach built around vocabulary, fluency, input, and output practice.

A1.label: Complete beginner
A1.description: Start from the foundations and build everyday basics.

A2.label: I know some basics
A2.description: You can handle simple situations and want to grow range.

B1.label: Conversational
B1.description: You can get by and want stronger fluency and precision.

B2.label: Advanced
B2.description: You want more nuance, confidence, and flexible expression.

pronouns.title: What are your pronouns?
pronouns.subtitle: Helps us personalise your experience (optional).
pronouns.saveErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

index.unableToLoadChild: We were unable to load this child's profile.

clearAlert.title: Clear mentor memory?
clearAlert.message: This will remove all notes the mentor has saved about {{name}}. This cannot be undone.

index.profileNoLongerAvailable: This profile is no longer available
index.profileRemovedOrNoAccess: The profile may have been removed or you no longer have access
index.noAccessToProfile: You don't have access to this profile
index.monthlyReportsSummary: Detailed summaries of your child's learning each month
index.firstReportSoon: The first report will arrive at the end of the month
index.progressUnlockMessage: Progress details unlock after the first few sessions
index.recentGrowthSubtitle: Topics mastered over the last 8 weeks
index.manageMentorMemoryForChild: Manage what the mentor remembers about {{name}}
index.learningAccommodationDescription: Adjust how the mentor teaches to fit your child's learning needs
index.consentRestrictedTitle: Consent needed before progress is shown
index.consentRestrictedPendingBody: {{name}}'s learning details are hidden until consent is active. Check again after consent is completed.
index.consentRestrictedRequestedBody: The consent request for {{name}} is already waiting for approval. Once it is approved, progress appears here automatically.
index.consentRestrictedWithdrawnBody: {{name}}'s learning details are hidden because consent was withdrawn. Restore consent to keep the account active during the grace period.
index.childProfileScopeHint: Progress and reports live in their own tabs, so this page only keeps child-specific settings.
index.consentStatusError: Could not load consent status. Please try again.
index.deletionGraceFallback: Deletion is scheduled. Try cancelling now if this was a mistake.
index.withdrawConsentBody: {{childName}}'s account and learning data will be deleted after a 7-day grace period. (For under-13 accounts, deletion is immediate at grace expiry to align with privacy law.)

mentorMemory.title: Mentor memory
mentorMemory.subtitle: What the mentor knows about {{name}}
mentorMemory.collectionDescription: When on, the mentor saves observations about {{name}} during sessions.
mentorMemory.injectionDescription: When on, the mentor uses saved observations to personalise sessions for {{name}}.
mentorMemory.tellTheMentorPlaceholder: Add a note for the mentor about {{name}}…
mentorMemory.noMemoryDescription: The mentor will start saving observations about {{name}} after a few sessions.
mentorMemory.privacyNote: Memory is private and only visible to you.
mentorMemory.correctionPlaceholder: What should the mentor know instead?

clearMemoryAlert.title: Clear all memory?
clearMemoryAlert.message: This will permanently delete all mentor memory for {{name}}.

mentorMemory.clearMemoryBody: This will remove everything the mentor has learned about your child. This cannot be undone.
mentorMemory.savedMentorWillRemember: Saved — the mentor will remember this
mentorMemory.learnAboutChildDescription: Allow the mentor to build a memory of your child's strengths and focus areas
mentorMemory.useWhatMentorKnowsDescription: Let the mentor personalise sessions using what it has learned
mentorMemory.whatSeemsWrongDescription: Describe the correction and the mentor will take it into account
